workouts.name: 45 Min Full Body
workouts.content:
Warm-Up: 5 min easy row

Block 1 — Lower Body (3 rounds, 45s on / 15s rest):
• Barbell/goblet squat
• Romanian deadlift (dumbbells)
• Glute bridge
• Reverse lunge (alternating)

Block 2 — Upper Body (3 rounds, 45s on / 15s rest):
• Cable lat pulldown
• Dumbbell shoulder press
• Cable seated row
• Dumbbell bicep curl

Block 3 — Cardio (8 min):
• 8 x 1-min treadmill intervals (30s fast / 30s recover, incline 3-5%)

Cool Down: 5 min full body stretch
